channel.title: GitHub Trending Changes
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub trending repositories

item.title: agentscope-ai / ReMe
item.description:

ReMe: Memory Management Kit for Agents - Remember Me, Refine Me.

item.title: msitarzewski / agency-agents
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 6,074 → 7,188 (+1114) | Ranked #1
A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables. 1,469 stars today

item.title: TheCraigHewitt / seomachine
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 1,257 → 1,584 (+327) | Ranked #2
A specialized Claude Code workspace for creating long-form, SEO-optimized blog content for any business. This system helps you research, write, analyze, and optimize content that ranks well and serves your target audience.
Language: Python 371 stars today

item.title: KeygraphHQ / shannon
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 31,396 → 31,769 (+373) | Ranked #3
Shannon Lite is a fully autonomous AI pentester for web apps and APIs. 96.15% (100/104 exploits) on a hint-free, source-aware variant of the XBOW benchmark.
Language: TypeScript 2,926 stars today

item.title: moeru-ai / airi
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 26,232 → 27,283 (+1051) | Ranked #5

item.title: microsoft / mcp-for-beginners
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 14,686 → 14,874 (+188) | Ranked #7
This open-source curriculum introduces the fundamentals of Model Context Protocol (MCP) through real-world, cross-language examples in .NET, Java, TypeScript, JavaScript, Rust and Python. Designed for developers, it focuses on practical techniques for building modular, scalable, and secure AI workflows from session setup to service orchestration.
Language: Jupyter Notebook 122 stars today
